subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Whose proof hath shone forth, Whose dominion hath been made manifest, Whose bounties have encompassed all, Whose clear path hath appeared, and Whose Law hath been revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن لاح برهانه و ظهر سلطانه و عم احسانه و بانت محجته البیضاء و ظهر شریعته
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @unity; oneness of humanity, @prayer for forgiveness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @exhortations and counsels
